title: helictotrichon leoninum
intro: Helictotrichon leoninum, also known as golden oats or oat grass, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the grass family and is native to Europe and Asia. The medicinal properties of Helictotrichon leoninum are attributed to its high content of silica and other minerals, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and improve skin conditions, such as eczema and acne. Helictotrichon leoninum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in herbal medicine to support bone health and reduce the risk of osteoporosis.
